writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a family member's job
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a family member's job and daily tasks.
writing.sampleAnswer: My father is a doctor. He works at a hospital and helps many patients every day. My mother is a nurse. She takes care of patients and gives them medicine.
checklist: Mô tả ít nhất 1 nhiệm vụ cụ thể
Dùng đúng Present Simple với He/She

writing.title: Writing Task 1: What do they do?
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing what different people in your family do for work, using What do/does...do?
writing.sampleAnswer: I am a programmer. I write computer code. My sister is an architect. She designs buildings. My father is a pilot, and my mother is a journalist.
checklist: Nêu được ít nhất 3 nghề nghiệp khác nhau
Mô tả công việc cụ thể cho mỗi người
Câu văn mạch lạc, không lặp cấu trúc quá nhiều
